## Research note

**Question:**
**Main finding (one sentence, incl. null results):**
**Folder:** `XXX-your-slug`

## Methodology checklist

- [ ] Hypothesis stated **before** the result
- [ ] **No lookahead** — decisions use only past data
- [ ] Out-of-sample / multiple-testing controlled where relevant
- [ ] Realistic transaction costs where relevant
- [ ] **Reproducible** — one seeded script regenerates every number & figure
- [ ] Limitations stated honestly; no overclaiming
- [ ] I am the author and agree to MIT (code) + CC BY 4.0 (writing)

## Anything reviewers should know
